name: Can employer make me take lower paying job after fall?

mainEntity.name: Can employer make me take lower paying job after fall?

acceptedAnswer.text: Must match restrictions or pay full benefits.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, if it violates light duty restrictions; they must accommodate or pay total disability.** Utah/Idaho rules protect.[1] Key factors: (1) Doctor limits followed; (2) Bona fide offers only; (3) Refusal justified if unsafe. Track offers. Lawyer enforces rights.

description: Must match restrictions or pay full benefits.
